title: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models
innovation_summary: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models: We introduce dOPSD, which instead derives the teacher's privilege directly from the student's own denoising trajectory, evaluating masked positions using later, more-decoded steps of that same.
why_it_matters: Overall signal 81/100 driven by novelty 100 and practical impact 76.
